blocks.text: City strike back — Arsenal's lead down to three
City trail by just 3 points with a game in hand. The momentum has shifted — what looked like Arsenal's title is suddenly very much City's to take.
🎾 Madrid Open — Ruud's clay fortress opens, Masters 1000 begins today
